segments.text: You're wasting your money on expensive
perfumes. And the worst part, you know
it and you still keep on buying it. This
is not about perfume. This is about your
brain. Let me show you that. Most of the
brands add thick glass at the bottom of
the bottles. Metal caps, extra weight.
Why? Because this works. Scientists
tested it. Same perfume, two bottle, one
heavy, [music] one light. People paid
significantly more for the heavier one.
They are hijacking your brain. Because
when you hold something heavy, your
subconscious instantly connected with
quality [music] and worth. These
connections form in two tenth of a
second before you can have a actual
thought. And now even the budget brands
are knowing this trick. Minio,
Fragerote, Engage, they all are using it
too. But the craziest part, even after
you know this, even after you watch this
video, you're going to fall for the same
thing again. Your conscious brain will
know that the weight is fake, but your
subconscious will still fall for it.
Will you still buy them? Let me know.
